title: [Bug]  `podman run --pull never` unexpectedly pulls the image when `--platform` is specified.
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

`podman run --pull never` unexpectedly pulls the image when `--platform` is specified.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. `podman run --pull never --rm -it --platform linux/amd64 docker.io/nginxinc/nginx-unprivileged`

**Describe the results you received:**
```
Trying to pull docker.io/nginxinc/nginx-unprivileged:latest...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob dc0d3d5f7efc done  
Copying blob 7a6db449b51b [==============>-----------------------] 11.6MiB / 29.9MiB
Copying blob ac6c01c07e07 done  
Copying blob ad38be4eed65 done  
Copying blob d13fc1ef8611 [===========>--------------------------] 7.4MiB / 24.2MiB
Copying blob e3fe36a31a97 done  
Copying blob 96d192a16e5c done  
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
`Error: docker.io/nginxinc/nginx-unprivileged: image not known`

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
podman version
Version:      3.4.7
API Version:  3.4.7
Go Version:   go1.19
Built:        Thu Jan  1 00:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md)**

Not the latest version.

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**
ChromeOS

comments.body:
Hi @kkimdev ,

I don't think following bug persists on upstream or newer version.
```console
podman run --pull never --rm -it --platform linux/amd64 docker.io/nginxinc/nginx-unprivileged
Error: docker.io/nginxinc/nginx-unprivileged: image not known
```
Could you please update your podman to `4.2.x` ? and try again ?

I'm closing the issue for above reasons.
I see. I failed to install the latest version on ChromeOS so couldn't test but thanks for verifying!
